items.title: Netflix Free For 50 Years? Reality If You Invested $1,000 In Streamer When 'Stranger Things' Came Out
items.description: A fifth and final season of "Stranger Things" premieres on Nov. 26, 2025. Here's a look back at how much Netflix stock has gained since the first season.
